meta.title: Kara — Work less. Enjoy more.
meta.description: Kara is a local-first AI desktop assistant for businesses, SMBs and everyday people who want private automation without giving up control.

hero.title: Work less. Enjoy more.
hero.subtitle: Kara is the local-first AI desktop assistant that helps businesses, lean teams and normal humans get real work done without throwing their private data around the internet.

features.title: Private AI that still feels fast, useful and human
features.subtitle: Built for businesses and SMBs first, but friendly enough for anyone who wants fewer tabs, less busywork and more done before lunch.

privacy.title: Private by default
privacy.description: Sensitive notes, client context and internal docs stay closer to your machine instead of being sprayed across random tools.

business.title: Made for real work
business.description: From follow-ups and ops to documentation and support, Kara is aimed at work that pays the bills, not toy demos.

teams.title: Perfect for lean teams
teams.description: Small teams and growing companies can automate repetitive work without needing a whole AI task force to babysit it.

everyday.title: Also great for normal life
everyday.description: Kara can help with planning, writing, organizing and the messy digital chores you never wanted to do yourself.

orchestration.title: One assistant. Your rules.
orchestration.subtitle: Kara keeps the core flow close to your desk, knows when to stay local and only reaches for outside services when the task truly needs extra muscle.

local.title: Local first.
local.description: Private work starts on-device, so drafts, customer notes and internal context do not need to leave home on every request.

teams.title: Built for business teams.
teams.description: Founders, ops, sales, support and small teams get one calm place to automate repeat work without duct-taping five different apps.

escalation.title: Cloud only when it helps.
escalation.description: When a task needs more reach, Kara can call services and models on purpose instead of making every workflow cloud-first by default.

integrations.title: Kara is cooking. Want in first?
integrations.subtitle: We are building the desktop experience now. Join the waitlist for launch news, private previews and early access before the public release planned for late 2026, or earlier if we move fast.

execution.title: Keep control of the work, not just the window

interface.title: Quiet interface
interface.description: A focused desktop experience built to help you think clearly, move fast and avoid dashboard overload.

speed.title: Local speed
speed.description: Less bouncing between services means quicker answers and a workflow that feels close to the task.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.description: Kara is designed so sensitive work can stay private by default, with control where it matters most.

stack.title: Ready for your stack
stack.description: Use Kara as a desktop app and service layer that can plug into the way your team already works.

cta.title: Private AI for work that actually moves.
cta.subtitle: Kara helps teams, SMBs and curious humans automate the boring parts while keeping control close.

hero.title: How Kara ships from May to December
hero.subtitle: A focused path from multiplatform foundation to cloud integrations, with a concrete MVP in August 2026.

goal.label: Outcome
goal.value: Desktop-first AI platform ready to scale

timeline.title: Monthly roadmap by shipping milestones
timeline.subtitle: Every month has a clear focus, delivery target and release criteria.

may.goal: Set up the multiplatform base for Windows, macOS, Linux and Docker.
may.deliverable: Desktop runtime and build pipeline validated across all targets.

jun.goal: Build the first complete desktop interface with main navigation and operational views.
jun.deliverable: UI v1 ready for daily internal usage.

jul.goal: Ship update system v1, language support and initial web documentation.
jul.deliverable: Controlled app updates and bilingual operation enabled.

aug.goal: Release Kara MVP for early adopters with local model flows and initial communication integrations.
aug.deliverable: Tagged MVP release and pilot feedback loop active.

sep.goal: Expand communication channels with Telegram, Discord, Slack and WhatsApp (wave 1).
sep.deliverable: First channel connectors running with event traceability.

oct.goal: Advance Kara AI tools (Cron, Media, Voices, TTS) with reliability controls.
oct.deliverable: Reusable automations combining channels and AI tools.

nov.goal: Integrate cloud models and first cloud tools (Notion, Figma, GitHub).
nov.deliverable: Hybrid local-cloud flows available under controlled rollout.

dec.goal: Close the phase and approve the next roadmap cycle.
dec.deliverable: Formal decision with prioritized next-phase backlog.

mvp.title: MVP scope in August 2026
mvp.subtitle: The MVP is defined by what users can run end-to-end, not by future promises.

included.desktop: Desktop app working on Windows, macOS and Linux.
included.ui: Stable UI v1 for configuration and daily usage.
included.docs: Web documentation v1 for onboarding and setup.
included.localModels: Guided local model download flow v1.
included.tools: AI tools baseline: Cron, Media, Voices and TTS.

excluded.fullCloud: Full catalog of cloud connectors and advanced provider coverage.
excluded.enterprise: Advanced enterprise governance and deep observability automation.

phases.title: The tracks that structure delivery
phases.subtitle: Kara evolves through coordinated tracks that keep product, engineering and operations aligned.

platform.title: Multiplatform runtime
platform.description: Desktop binaries and Docker support with reproducible builds.

experience.title: User experience
experience.description: Sectioned interface, clear navigation and operational visibility.

trust.title: Updates and reliability
trust.description: Controlled releases, rollback paths and stable update channels.

language.title: Multilingual product
language.description: English and Spanish parity in key user journeys.

ai.title: AI tools orchestration
ai.description: Cron, media and voice tooling orchestrated for practical automation.

cloud.title: Cloud integrations
cloud.description: Hybrid local-cloud model routing plus tool integrations like Notion, Figma and GitHub.

launch.title: Launch readiness
launch.description: MVP validation, pilot feedback and go/no-go decisions for the next cycle.

cta.title: Want launch updates as these phases ship?
cta.subtitle: Join early access to follow each milestone and help shape the next phase of Kara.

footer.title: Private AI for work that actually moves.
footer.subtitle: Kara helps teams, SMBs and curious humans automate the boring parts while keeping control close.

modal.heading: اللغة
modal.noResultsHint: جرّب اسمًا آخر أو رمز لغة.

footer.rights: All rights reserved. Built by AuthUser.

waitlist.typeLabel: Are you joining as an individual or a company?
waitlist.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what challenges your team faces or why you're interested in Kara
waitlist.consentLabel: I accept the privacy policy and would like to receive updates about Kara

featureContent.title: Do more with your voice, your time and your creativity
featureContent.subtitle: Kara lets you interact directly by voice, schedule daily tasks and generate multimedia content effortlessly.
featureContent.imageAlt: Preview of voice and multimedia interaction in Kara

voice.title: Speak and act
voice.description: Control Kara and get answers using just your voice, no keyboard needed.

tasks.title: Automate daily tasks
tasks.description: Schedule reminders, events and daily routines so nothing slips through the cracks.

media.title: Create multimedia content
media.description: Generate images, audio and video for your projects or social media in seconds.

functions.title: Capabilities designed to run 24/7
functions.subtitle: Kara combines voice conversation, chat connectors and proactive automation to help you make better decisions every day.

voice.title: Real-time two-way voice
voice.description: You can talk to Kara directly by voice and Kara can answer back by voice to keep the workflow natural, fast and frictionless.

channels.title: Chat integrations ready to use
channels.description: Integrates chat providers such as Telegram, Teams, WhatsApp and Discord so you can centralize conversations and actions in one place.

media.title: Multimedia generation
media.description: Generate multimedia content for messaging, support, sales and operations without leaving your workflow.

assistant.title: Passive and proactive assistance
assistant.description: Operates as a passive and/or proactive assistant to improve decision-making and keep operations running 24/7.
